feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Angry Birds 3 Movie Discussion Thread
entry.content: You birds can hate Leonard pig all you want, but you have to admit, he's got style. He even acquired his own loli pig in the second movie. What are the chances we'll see Leonard and Courtney's kids by the time the 3rd movie comes around? They could do another truce where the pigs and birds work together to save their hatchlings/piglets from a monster from a 4th island or something. Thoughts /tv/?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >ask G ai thing if it knows something about [semi obscure thing] >"Sure! [comple…
entry.content: >ask G ai thing if it knows something about [semi obscure thing] >"Sure! [complete hallucinated garbage] >Sorry but you're completely wrong *tell it a couple things I know are true* >Oh I am sorry, you are correct of course! [continues to drivel on about how it sometimes gets things so wrong] How is this a feature in production and not a beta test at best? Why can't they program into it to give a clear "I don't know" when it does in fact not know? This hallucination shit when it doesn't know is
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Odyssey looks like shit
entry.content: Lately I have seen a lot of criticism-defelection about how if you don’t like how the Odyssey (2026) looks you must be a racist chud et cetera Yet I just watched Alexander Nevsky, which is for all intents and purposes a Soviet propoganda piece, and yet looks a million times better than the gay hollywood cheap costuming like Nolan’s film Why can’t any of you queers recognize that this isn’t an inherently political issue but merely a case of shit filmmaking?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.content: Thinking of chairs after my ergo chair just fucking broke and I have no backrest anymore. I want a decent chair I can actually rest on. I don't work at home, I don't think I want a wagie chair. I want to lean back and I don't want this shit to break just because of my inconvenient 200lbs. I don't want to buy a refurbished chair and it's a mess anyways to deal with that in my cunt. Any recommendations? I'm willing to put 800 europoors on it. Pic related (Libernovo Omni) is just a bit over that an

entry.title: /mu/ Music: When you were younger, you thought of invigorating your small town's music scene…
entry.content: When you were younger, you thought of invigorating your small town's music scene. You were going to cut through all the boring folk and dad rock cover bands with something new and real that spoke to your fellow youth. Nothing was going to be the same after you. You were supposed to lead the charge that put Bumfuck, Nowhere town on the map as a place that could produce interesting new music. What happened?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: American drivers are spiritually hindu
entry.content: American drivers are spiritually hindu. Every american driver believes they are in some kind of demolition derby or deathmatch with every other driver. There is no cooperation, no defensive driving technique, it's "we do what I want or I'll kill us both". Except they never have the guts to follow through with their threats so it just becomes a fender bender and weeks of headache for everyone involved. It all comes down to izzat. Everyone on here mocks indians for having their backwards honor cul
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /b/ Random: my old self doesn't exist anymore...like I'm literally not that person anymore, …
entry.content: my old self doesn't exist anymore...like I'm literally not that person anymore, it's like i was never even born...this is very strange, i feel fine, but something just seems a bit "off"...is this some dream my old self is having? seems too good to be true, to be divorced from all the pains and sufferings of my old self, and i am now some different person who has never known extreme suffering...maybe my old self "passed the baton" to me? like, he went as far as he could possibly go on his own, an
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: /int/ confessions
entry.content: When I was a kid I'd spent a fair amount of my weekends at my grandparent's farm and who happened to have a neighbor who owned a shitbull that'd always chase and try to bite me. Well, this one weekend my granddad was bitching at me to change out the frames in the beehives in the beehive since they were filled with honey on the edge of our property and something I fucking hated doing since I'd always managed to get stung. Anyway, the fucking faggot mutt ran up to the fence and starting chimping o
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: amazing
entry.content: if you do not sleep for ~7 days straight, they say you'll go crazy. but many, many people misunderstand why! it makes you realize that from infancy to adulthood, there were never any breaks or "phases". sleep is the only thing that splits the days. if you could somehow stay awake from birth to 80 years old... your life wouldn't feel very profound.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /pmdt/ - Pokemon Mystery Dungeon Trash General #113
entry.content: Sharpedo Bluff Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83920015/ Welcome to /pmdt/! A thread for posting art, writing, and discussing of the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon Series! Especially if it's saucy~ You can post art, recommend comics or fanfics, talk about the games/setting, or just roll to see what Pokémon you wake up as! If you'd like to join in the RP, the Lore Archive gives a general summary of the setting and history so far! We have a shared setting for the thread if you wish
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PCIE WIFI 7 BT 5.4 card that works with intel (and linux)?
entry.content: Hey frens does anyone know for sure what wifi 7 bt 4 pcie card works with AMD/linux. AI is fucking useless for this i wasted my entire day running in circles, turns out most of them only work with intel/win11.. In the end the one most likelyu to work is >MSI HERALD MAX BE Wi-Fi 7 MAX Wireless BT 5.4 QCNCM865 Has anyone tested it? Thanks...
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ive been living with rock music for so long... and honestly the genre just feels…
entry.content: ive been living with rock music for so long... and honestly the genre just feels so stale to me now. maybe im the problem but it kinda feels like its been running in circles for years and i kept waiting for something to pull me back in... i think i will descend from my self-imposed cave and finally listen to all the hyperpop and revival stuff i kept pretending i would get around to someday... i used to foolishly think i had already missed the moment and that there was no point trying to catch up
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Dodge Ram 4500 w Cummins ISB 6.7
entry.content: >Truck was apparently having some starter solenoid relay issues. (Wasn’t my job to fix at the time) >Another mechanic had taught the driver how to internally close the relay to turn over the truck Well today he goes to the oil changers and they swap his filters. The truck started up then fell flat on its face after idling for a moment. I’m very familiar with the priming procedure and figured either bad filter swap or bad priming job. When I got down there I had no crank no start at the key. I co
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3000
entry.content: >It's Over 3000! Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84061791/ >Scripts to check image metadata: re
